item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Scholar's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned scholar─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level scholar to 60 and complete all job quests up through “Forward, the Royal Marines.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
